content:
# Construction And Demolition Waste

**Summary**: Waste generated from construction, demolition, renovation, roadwork, and excavation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] analyzed C&D waste as the primary component of solid waste in Saudi Arabia.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] C&D waste is a major environmental concern due to its volume and the difficulty of separating its components.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] quantified via estimation based on area size.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- C&D waste accounts for 30-40% of total solid waste in the region. ([[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022, p. 15]])
